name: Tarragon-Cider Basting Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart saucepan, combine the cider, vinegar, sliced green onions, butter, steak sauce, honey, salt, dried tarragon, and freshly cracked pepper.
2. Bring the mixture to boiling.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Use as a meat marinade or baste chicken, beef, pork, or fish during the last 15 to 20 minutes of barbecuing.
5. Heat and pass the remaining sauce. Makes about 3/4 cup of sauce.
